tasks.subject: Task 0: lifecycle.capacity_wait config field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** capacity_wait duration field on lifecycle config, parsed like boot_timeout, surfaced as Lifecycle.capacity_wait_s (default 300s).

**Files:** interfaces.py (Lifecycle), config.py (LifecycleConfig + validator + lifecycle() map), tests/core/test_config.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k capacity_wait -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k capacity_wait -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["duration string parses to 300.0", "defaults 300.0", "surfaces on Lifecycle.capacity_wait_s"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RunPod classifies 'no instances available' as CapacityError
tasks.description:
**Goal:** _create_pod raises existing CapacityError for the two 'no longer any instances available' variants.

**Files:** providers/runpod/__init__.py (_create_pod match), tests/providers/test_runpod_capacity_error.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_capacity_error.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_capacity_error.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_capacity_error.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both no-instances variants CapacityError", "resources-to-deploy still CapacityError", "non-capacity stays ValueError"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Capacity-wait retry loop in orchestrator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** On CapacityError, re-query find_offers + retry create every 25s until capacity_wait_s, then re-raise.

**Files:** core/orchestrator.py (_create_with_capacity_wait + wire into _provision_instance_and_build_backend), tests/core/test_capacity_wait_retry.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_capacity_wait_retry.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_capacity_wait_retry.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_capacity_wait_retry.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["retries then succeeds re-querying offers", "zero-wait fails first miss", "deadline reraises", "non-capacity propagates"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Pure boot-liveness classifier (core/boot_liveness.py)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure classify_boot_liveness → BootVerdict + flatline counter; BootVerdict enum + BootLivenessProbe protocol + BootLivenessResult.

**Files:** core/boot_liveness.py (new), tests/core/test_boot_liveness.py (new).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_boot_liveness.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/boot_liveness.py", "tests/core/test_boot_liveness.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_boot_liveness.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GONE/STALLED/ALIVE/UNKNOWN precedence", "grace suppresses flatline", "disk-None safe", "progress resets counter"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: RunPod BootLivenessProbe implementation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stateful RunPod probe: check(id) fetches util snap + bootstrap.log tail → classify_boot_liveness, tracks prev snap + counter + boot-start clock.

**Files:** providers/runpod/__init__.py (RunPodBootLivenessProbe + _fetch_bootstrap_log_tail + make_boot_liveness_probe), tests/providers/test_runpod_boot_liveness.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_boot_liveness.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod_boot_liveness.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_boot_liveness.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GONE on absent", "STALLED on trap rc!=0", "STALLED after K flatline across calls", "never raises on fetch error"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Consult boot probe in wait_for_ready
tasks.description:
**Goal:** wait_for_ready (diffusers + comfyui) consults injected probe on throttle, aborts GONE/STALLED with ProvisionFailed; get_instance KeyError → ProvisionFailed; probe=None preserves timeout. Orchestrator attaches provider probe.

**Files:** engines/diffusers/__init__.py, engines/comfyui/__init__.py, core/orchestrator.py, tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_boot_stall.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_boot_stall.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_boot_stall.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/test_diffusers_wait_for_ready_boot_stall.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["STALLED/GONE abort ProvisionFailed", "KeyError maps to ProvisionFailed", "None probe preserves ProvisionTimeout", "probe throttled"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Widen FlashVSR config + set capacity_wait
tasks.description:
**Goal:** upscale-flashvsr-1080p.yaml — 4 Ampere/Hopper 80GB types under $3.00 cap + capacity_wait: 5m.

**Files:** examples/configs/upscale-flashvsr-1080p.yaml, tests/core/test_config.py.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k flashvsr_widened -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/upscale-flashvsr-1080p.yaml", "tests/core/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_config.py -k flashvsr_widened -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 gpu prefs in order", "cap 3.00", "capacity_wait 300s"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Full-suite + lint/type green, update PROGRESS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Whole suite green, lint/type clean, PROGRESS records the feature.

**Files:** PROGRESS.md.

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`; `pixi run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full suite green", "lint+typecheck clean", "pre-commit passes", "PROGRESS updated"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
